payload.summary: Quarantine validation subprocesses from Symphony run operation-log environment
payload.notes: Backlog #1 is only partially addressed: story verify scrubs run environment, but story verify-all still inherits it. Scope is validation child processes only.

payload.title: Validation Subprocess Write Quarantine
payload.contract_doc: Verification subprocesses cannot inherit Symphony run operation-log environment; parent proof records remain logged normally.
payload.verify_command: sh -c 'cargo test -p harness-cli validation_subprocesses_do_not_inherit_run_operation_log_env -- --nocapture && scripts/validate-changeset-rebuild.sh && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -p harness-cli -- -D warnings && git diff --check'
payload.notes: Implements the remaining verify-all isolation gap from backlog #1; story packet: docs/stories/US-081-validation-subprocess-write-quarantine.md.
